description: Author a HyperFrames slideshow composition — a presentation, pitch deck, or interactive deck with discrete slides, fragment reveals, branching sequences, and hotspot navigation. Use as an intent check when the user asks for a presentation, pitch deck, slide deck, interactive deck, or page-to-deck conversion that might be a slideshow; if the user did not explicitly ask for a slideshow / slide show, confirm before authoring.
representativeQueries: Create a pitch deck presentation for investors
Author an interactive slideshow with speaker notes
Build a slide deck with hotspot navigation
Design a presentation with branching sequences
Convert a webpage into an interactive slideshow
